title: Principal AI Engineer
company_focus: Global insurance group with employee ownership
description:
Who are we?

Howden is a global insurance group with employee ownership
at its heart. Together, we have pushed the boundaries of
insurance. We are united by a shared passion and no-limits
mindset, and our strength lies in our ability to collaborate
as a powerful international team comprised of 23,000
employees spanning over 56 countries.

People join Howden for many different reasons, but they stay
for the same one: our culture. It’s what sets us apart, and
the reason our employees have been turning down headhunters
for years. Whatever your priorities – work / life balance,
career progression, sustainability, volunteering – you’ll
find like-minded people driving change at Howden.

About The Role

Howden Group Services is expanding its AI & Data Science
capabilities and is looking for a contract Principal AI
Engineer to help accelerate our transformation and build
enterprise-grade solutions with AI at their core that will
be used by hundreds of colleagues across the Group.

You will report into the Group Head of Data Science and will
bring deep technical expertise on developing, building and
productionising AI applications. You will be given freedom
to experiment, test and bring new technologies that push the
envelope on using AI to solve enterprise problems and apply
them to the complex business domain of commercial insurance.

Role Responsibilities

- Design and implement robust Machine Learning and AI
  workflows using orchestration tools such as Airflow (or
  equivalent tools more suited to AI workflows)
- Ground LLM solutions by integrating appropriate data
  sources, design and develop RAG architectures, design and
  craft effective prompt templates, apply constraints to
  guide model behaviour and validate AI outputs against
  expected results
- Work with our Data Platform Engineering team to build and
  maintain CI/CD pipelines for ML and AI solutions covering
  model training, evaluation and deployment
- Design and implement model registries, versioning systems,
  and experiment tracking to ensure full reproducibility of
  all model releases
- Build model monitoring solutions tracking performance,
  drift, accuracy and overall solution health

Your Skills

- Track record of shipping production ML and AI systems at
  scale in enterprise environments
- Extensive experience deploying ML and AI solutions through
  CI/CD pipelines, MLOps best practices, model lifecycle
  management, and software development best practices (git,
  testing & code review)
- Experience with LLM architectures, including vector
  databases, RAG architectures, and semantic search systems,
  and implementing these to enterprise-grade production
  standards
- Experience of designing and implementing monitoring and
  solution health KPIs
- Experience of working in cloud AI ecosystems. Familiarity
  with AzureML, Azure AI Foundry and/or Databricks a strong
  plus
- Deep Python programming skills and software engineering
  experience applied to data science solutions
- Ability to write documentation that others can rely on and
  use

Bonus points if you have:

- Experience designing and developing RESTful APIs and an
  understanding of API Management frameworks
- Knowledge of Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agent
  communication standards
- Working understanding of agentic AI patterns, multi-agent
  systems, and autonomous decision-making frameworks
- Experience with enterprise AI frameworks (LangChain AutoGPT,
  CrewAI or similar)
- Experience setting technical standards, governance
  frameworks, and performance benchmarks in a regulated
  industry

At Howden, we are looking to build a diverse team and
promote the development of individuals of all backgrounds.
If you have experience of mentoring and coaching others,
we’d encourage you to apply if you meet the majority of
these requirements and are driven by learning, developing
and picking up the required skills to make you successful in
your role.

Core Responsibilities for all Staff

Achieve Results through Relationships with All Parties

- Deliver a personal performance that contributes towards
  Group and/or Company achieving their objectives.
- Achieve lasting relationships with all parties (internal
  clients, suppliers, third parties and other staff).

Delivery of Service

- Consistently deliver an excellent and comprehensive service,
  on-time, within budget and to, or exceeding quality
  expectations.

Conduct and Integrity

- Ensure all dealings are carried out with integrity and
  professionalism.
- Act in utmost good faith, in accordance with Group and/or
  Company policies and never risk the Company’s or the
  Group’s reputation.

Reporting

- Monitor and report on Business Units’ issues.
- Provide relevant management information to senior
  management.
- Any other reasonable duties, as required.

What do we offer in return?

A career that you define. At Howden, we value diversity –
there is no one Howden type. Instead, we’re looking for
individuals who share the same values as us:

- Our successes have all come from someone brave enough to try
  something new
- We support each other in the small everyday moments and the
  bigger challenges
- We are determined to make a positive difference at work and
  beyond

Reasonable adjustments

We're committed to providing reasonable accommodations at
Howden to ensure that our positions align well with your
needs.  Besides the usual adjustments such as software, IT,
and office setups, we can also accommodate other changes
such as flexible hours* or hybrid working*.

If you're excited by this role but have some doubts about
whether it’s the right fit for you, send us your application
– if your profile fits the role’s criteria, we will be in
touch to assist in helping to get you set up with any
reasonable adjustments you may require.

*Not all positions can accommodate changes to working hours
or locations. Reach out to your Recruitment Partner if you
want to know more.

Permanent
responsibilities: Design and implement robust Machine Learning and AI workflows using orchestration tools such as Airflow
Ground LLM solutions by integrating appropriate data sources, design and develop RAG architectures, and craft effective prompt templates
Work with Data Platform Engineering team to build and maintain CI/CD pipelines for ML and AI solutions covering model training, evaluation and deployment
Design and implement model registries, versioning systems, and experiment tracking to ensure full reproducibility of all model releases
Build model monitoring solutions tracking performance, drift, accuracy and overall solution health
Apply constraints to guide model behaviour and validate AI outputs against expected results
use_cases: Enterprise-grade AI solutions for commercial insurance domain
LLM-powered applications using RAG architectures and semantic search
AI workflows for complex business problem solving in insurance
Automated decision-making systems for insurance operations
Knowledge retrieval systems using vector databases and semantic search
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a hands-on AI engineering role focused on designing
and implementing LLM solutions, RAG architectures, prompt
templates, and vector database integrations. The role
involves direct model development, deployment, and
productionisation - building AI systems rather than
supporting infrastructure for others.
